title: EQ - Button to change preset is present
scenario: EQ tab in Device Settings displays preset buttons (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ) with Bass selected by default
steps: Tap on a connected device to open Device Settings
Observe the preset buttons displayed below the headline
expected: The EQ tab in Device Settings displays preset buttons (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ) below the headline, with Bass selected by default.
